backends.name: Ollama (local)
backends.setupHint: Install Ollama and run `ollama pull llama3.2:3b`. Ollama exposes an OpenAI-compatible endpoint on port 11434.

backends.name: LM Studio (local)
backends.setupHint: Open LM Studio → Developer → Start Server. Replace `local-model` with the identifier shown in the server log.

backends.name: vLLM (self-hosted)
backends.setupHint: Run `vllm serve meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct`. Update `model` to match your deployment.

backends.name: OpenAI
backends.setupHint: Export `OPENAI_API_KEY=...` in the shell where you run `vaner daemon` / `vaner mcp`.

backends.name: Anthropic
backends.setupHint: Export `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=...`. Vaner uses the Messages API under the hood.

backends.name: OpenRouter
backends.setupHint: Export `OPENROUTER_API_KEY=...`. Pick any model slug from openrouter.ai/models.

backends.name: Skip for now
backends.snippet:
# No backend configured.
# Vaner's ponder loop will be a no-op until you set [backend].
backends.setupHint: You can pick a backend later with `vaner init --backend-preset <name>`.
